initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id
    WHERE b2.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m2.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond_type = 'single'
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
    )
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id
    WHERE b2.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m2.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond_type = 'single'
        AND molecule_id IN (
            SELECT molecule_id
            FROM molecule
            WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
        )
    )
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id
    WHERE b2.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m2.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT m3.molecule_id
        FROM molecule m3
        JOIN bond b3 ON m3.molecule_id = b3.molecule_id
        WHERE b3.bond_type = 'single'
        AND m3.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
    )
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id
    WHERE b2.bond_type = 'single'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
)
